_comment: Bridge config. Each target defines the search queries used on buy-side providers and the keys/overrides used to fetch MPB/eBay/F64 benchmarks. 'mpb_id' is an MPB product slug or full URL; 'mpb_floor' (EUR) is an optional manual override/fallback used when MPB scraping fails. All benchmark prices are treated as EUR.

targets.label: Sigma 24-70 f2.8 DG DN Art (Sony E)
targets.ebay_query: Sigma 24-70 2.8 DG DN Art Sony E
